title: Scuba Diving Website
subtitle: Simplified structure to make content easier to explore and act on.

leftItems.label: SERVICES
leftItems.value:
Brand Identity that commands respect

Website Design that converts

leftItems.label: CREDIT
leftItems.value: Imagery provided by client, composited and refined for an immersive visual direction.

blocks.infoText: Lacadives, a scuba diving company, needed their website to reflect the depth and excitement of the experience they offer, with a more premium feel built entirely around real imagery and blue as the dominant visual cue.I redesigned it to feel immersive and visually compelling at first glance—so when someone lands, they don’t just browse, they want to book.
